description_long: This is a modern military jet trainer aircraft with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a tandem two-seat cockpit under a clear, bubble canopy. The aircraft features sharply swept-back wings mounted low on the fuselage, with prominent twin vertical stabilizers at the tail, both painted in bright red with blue and white checkered tips. The main body is finished in a combination of matte black and light gray, with 'U.S. AIR FORCE' markings visible on the side. The jet engine is rear-mounted, with a single large exhaust nozzle at the back. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable and currently stowed.
description: A sleek, modern military jet trainer with a tandem cockpit, swept low-mounted wings, and twin red vertical stabilizers, finished in black and gray with U.S. Air Force markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, tandem cockpit, swept wings, and prominent red twin tail fins with markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the single jet exhaust, twin vertical stabilizers, and the red tail section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the cockpit, wings, and tail markings.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and the angular wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with a large exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a conventional tail arrangement with a horizontal stabilizer connecting them.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, implied by design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed tandem cockpit with a clear bubble canopy, suitable for two seats.
